recommended.song_name: Dont Tell Me You Love Me

content:
Sentimental Street 

Night Ranger

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]     
 Saw you walking out on Sentimental Street[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]Gsus[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] 
 What'cha doing out there, Who ya trying to be[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]              
 I know what you're thinking, 'cause I've been there myself[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]F/G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]  
 I've been kicked so many times, I don't know nothing else[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]              
 Still I noticed your urgency I recognized the flair[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Gsus[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            
 That ya got from chasing all those east coast dares[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]    
 I've seen it before it happens time and again[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] 
 All cut up inside, yet you're caught in a spin[/tab]


CHORUS:
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]

VERSE:

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Gsus[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]F/G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]Gsus[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
